'''Barab III''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Barab system/Legends|Barab system]]. A [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]] composed of [[Nitrogen/Legends|nitrogen]], Barab III was the outermost planet in the [[Star system/Legends|system]], which also contained the [[Barabel/Legends|Barabel]] [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Barab I/Legends|Barab I]]. It was [[Orbit/Legends|orbited]] by 34 [[Moon/Legends|moons]].

{{Planet-stub}}
